mechanics.raw_text:
After each PC has stated his desires, Samson asks the PC to pick a number from 
1-12, The PC is then assigned that item, 
Tactic 3: Any cally entertaining item not selected this way should be assigned at ran: 
dom. Don’t omit the rocket boots. Note: When each item is handed out, the designer steps forward and explains how ‘wonderful the item is. I the PC tess the item ‘on the spot and it doesn’t work, the designer ‘will of course blame the PC for damaging the item. PCs may wish they had accepted the items in silence and tested them later out of, sight of the designer. Hi High Tech Toys to Select From 
The name of the designer is in parentheses next tothe item, The PCs may lear that some 
designers are more reliable than others, and Use ths information to steer clear of dangerous, ‘useless items. 1, Personal Anti-Grav Unit: Seri PDQ.R&D-124-56 (Stanley-B): This simply doesn’t work, and never will. if the PCs try to test it, the technicians (afraid to offend the research head) will continue fooling with it, swearing that it was ust working a minute ago. If the unit is dismantled and inspected by an independent, highly-skilled technician, it would be excellent evidence that Stanley-B is a phony, and therefore a traitor. 2, Remote Control Surveillance Drone: PDQ- R&D-15-934 Schnect8): Ths sa mobile, n- telligent vid and sound. camera. which transmis to any standard multcorder. t moves at walk speed on lighterthar-air support and is driven by two small propeller motors; the drone can be operated witha contol joystick or by simple verbal commands. The drone is limited to line-ot sight for joystick control and shouting distance for verbal contol.
